channel.title: How to add custom tags inside <head>
channel.description: Hi there! New here. I'm not able to find the index.html to add custom tags inside <head>. What is the best way to add <meta> tags?

item.title: How to add custom tags inside <head>
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hi @didiraja! Welcome to the community

Frontity uses React Helmet internally. This means that you just have to import Head from frontity and include all the tags you want. You can check out our docs for a more detailed explanation. Anyway, here you have a quick example:

import { Head } from "frontity";

const Theme = () => (
    <Head>
        <title>My awesome blog</title>
        <meta name="description" content="This blog is just for being awesome" />
        <html lang="en" />
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://example.com" />
    </Head>
);

Read full topic
item.source: How to add custom tags inside <head>

item.title: How to add custom tags inside <head>
item.dc:creator: Digidig
item.description:

Read full topic
item.source: How to add custom tags inside <head>
